title: [SUPERSEDED] BR Turbostar Extension Pack
description: An MTR extension pack that adds several new British Rail Turbostar variants.
body:
# **About**
The Bombardier Turbostar is a family of diesel multiple unit (DMU) passenger trains that was built by ADtranz and later Bombardier Transportation at Derby Litchurch Lane Works in the United Kingdom between 1997 and 2011. The Turbostar was the first new train type to be introduced after the privatisation of British Rail.
# **Function**
This resource pack aims to add new variants of Turbostar trains via the MTR mod, including refurbished CrossCountry, Greater Anglia (Red + Blue), EMR Pride, EMT interim, Northern, National Express East Anglia, ScotRail, West Midlands Railway, London Overground and CrossCountry Poppy liveries.

**Thanks to ElectrostarJudge for the original Turbostar textures!**
